_comment: GDELT v2 Doc API channels for historical English-language backfill. Rate-limited public API — keep channel count minimal. Disable noisy channels via enabled_default:false or status:disabled.

channels.name: GDELT_CN_MACRO
channels._note: Best SNR of the three — PBOC/GDP/trade queries are precise enough
channels.query: (PBOC OR "People's Bank of China" OR "China monetary policy" OR "China economy" OR "China GDP" OR "China trade")

channels.name: GDELT_CN_MARKET
channels._note: Disabled: broad market keywords match too many off-topic articles
channels.query: ("China stock market" OR "Shanghai composite" OR "Shenzhen stock" OR "CSI 300" OR "A-shares" OR "MSCI China")

channels.name: GDELT_CN_POLICY
channels._note: Disabled: 'yuan/renminbi' pulls Pakistan forex and unrelated currency articles
channels.query: ("China securities regulator" OR CSRC OR "China financial regulation" OR "Chinese yuan" OR "renminbi" OR "China stimulus")
